home.hero: Pick the services you need. Nothing more.
home.subhero: Monthly subscriptions, transparent invoicing, secure payments via Stripe.

catalog.title: Service catalog
catalog.subtitle: All services currently available on the platform.
catalog.empty: No active services right now. Check back soon.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Takes a few seconds. We'll send you an email to confirm your address.
signup.terms: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
signup.successBody: We've sent a confirmation email to {{email}}. Click the link to activate your account.
signup.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters
signup.errorTermsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue
signup.disabled: Self-service registration is currently disabled. Please contact us if you need an account.

verify.title: Verify email
verify.successBody: Your account is active. You can now sign in.
verify.errorBody: The link is expired or invalid. Request a new verification email below.
verify.missingToken: Missing token. Open the link from the email you received.
verify.resendSent: If that address is registered and not yet verified, we've sent a new email.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to continue.
login.disabled: Login is temporarily disabled by an administrator. Please try again later.

mfa.prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

notVerified.title: Email address not verified
notVerified.body: We sent a verification link when you signed up. If you can't find it, request a new one.
notVerified.resendDone: If that address is registered and not yet verified, we've sent a new email.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.successBody: If that address is registered, we've sent a password reset link.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.successBody: You can now sign in with your new password.
reset.missingToken: Missing token. Open the link from the email you received.
reset.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters

billing.title: Billing details
billing.cta: The address and tax info we put on Stripe and on your invoices.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.cta: View active subscriptions, invoices, and activity.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.cta: Charges, refunds, and Stripe transaction history.

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods
paymentMethods.cta: Saved cards used for renewals and outstanding invoices.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Enter your current password and a new one. Your active session will be invalidated.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app (TOTP).
mfa.graceWarning: Two-factor is required for your role. Deadline: {{date}}.

enrol.title: Set up two-factor
enrol.subtitle: Three steps: start, scan, confirm. Save the backup codes somewhere safe.
enrol.step1: Start the flow to generate a fresh secret.
enrol.step2: Add the account to your authenticator app
enrol.scanInstructions: Open Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app and add a new account by entering the secret below.
enrol.step3: Confirm with the code from your app
enrol.backupSubtitle: Use these codes to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator. They are shown only once.
enrol.backupAcknowledge: I have saved these codes somewhere safe

subscribe.title: Confirm your subscription
subscribe.subtitle: Review the plan and we'll take you to Stripe to save a payment method. The first charge happens at the start of your billing cycle.
subscribe.plusSetup: Plus a one-time setup fee of {{fee}}.
subscribe.ownerHint: Default is personal billing. Pick an organization if you want to invoice on its behalf.
subscribe.cardNotice: We'll redirect you to Stripe Checkout to securely save a card. We won't charge it now — your first invoice is generated at the start of the billing cycle.
subscribe.errorMissingTier: We couldn't find which plan you wanted. Pick one from the catalog.
subscribe.errorTierGone: That plan is no longer available. Browse the catalog for current options.

billing.title: Billing details
billing.subtitle: Used for Stripe customer creation and on the invoices we issue.
billing.nextHint: Save your billing details to continue with checkout.
billing.emailHint: Optional. Used for Stripe receipts when different from your account email.
billing.vatHint: Italian P.IVA or EU VAT identifier.
billing.fiscalHintCompany: Italian Codice Fiscale (often equal to VAT number).
billing.countryHint: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. IT, DE, FR).
billing.provinceHint: Italian province code (e.g. RM, MI). Optional outside Italy.
billing.errorLegalName: Legal name is required for company billing.
billing.errorPersonName: Enter at least your first or last name.

subscribeReturn.successBody: Your card is saved with Stripe and your subscription is active.
subscribeReturn.cancelBody: We didn't save a payment method. You can return to the catalog anytime to retry.
subscribeReturn.errorMissing: We couldn't find which subscription this return URL refers to.
subscribeReturn.warnLookup: We couldn't load the subscription details. Check your account page in a moment.
subscribeReturn.firstChargeNotice: Your first invoice is generated at the start of your billing cycle and the card you just saved is charged automatically.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Active and past subscriptions across your accounts.
subscriptions.empty: No subscriptions yet. Pick a service to get started.

subscriptionDetail.errorMissing: We couldn't find which subscription this link refers to.
subscriptionDetail.errorLoad: Couldn't load this subscription. Try again in a moment.
subscriptionDetail.cancelPrompt: How should we cancel? Keep access until the period ends, or stop right away?
subscriptionDetail.invoicesEmpty: No invoices yet — your first one is generated at the start of the billing cycle.
subscriptionDetail.payNoPending: Nothing to pay right now — the renewal job will generate the next invoice automatically.
subscriptionDetail.paySuccess: Payment received. The invoice status will update once Stripe confirms it.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Every charge, retry, and refund attributed to your accounts.
transactions.empty: No transactions yet. Your first charge will appear here after the next billing cycle.

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods
paymentMethods.subtitle: Cards saved with Stripe and used for off-session renewals.
paymentMethods.empty: No saved payment methods. Add a card to power automatic renewals.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
